name: CRM Lead Update from Form Submissions
description: Watch for new Typeform/Google Form submissions, create or update a contact in HubSpot (free CRM), and send a personalised follow-up email via Gmail.

modules.notes: Replace YOUR_FORM_ID. Also works with Google Forms via the Webhooks module.
HubSpot CRM is free. Connect via the HubSpot app in Make.

config.subject: Thanks for reaching out, {{1.answers.first_name}}!
config.body:
Hi {{1.answers.first_name}},

Thanks for your interest! A member of our team will be in touch within 1 business day.

In the meantime, feel free to browse our resources at [YOUR_WEBSITE].

Best,
[YOUR_NAME]

setupSteps: 1. Import this JSON into Make (Scenarios → Import Blueprint).
2. Connect your Typeform account and select your form.
5. Customise the follow-up email body with your name and website.
